headline: Is EOG Resources, Inc. (EOG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is EOG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on EOG Resources, Inc. on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on EOG. EOG Resources, Inc.’s share was trading at $140.15 as of June 8th. EOG’s trailing and forward P/E were 13.55 and 7.89 respectively according to Yahoo […]
